subject: [CLASSIFIED] New Mutation Report
bodyHtml:
Designation: MALBEC
Known Alias: "The Rat King"
Species Origin: Rattus norvegicus
Class: Tenebrae

Last Recorded Location: Abandoned South Ferry Loop, Manhattan, New York City
Mutation Index: 7
Threat Level: High

Physical Description: Amalgamated rodent entity composed of several cranial structures sharing a single intertwined body mass.

Behavioral Notes: Heightened nocturnal activity. Capable of inducing localized power failures while maintaining full perception in near-total darkness.

Internal Directive: Do not pursue into dark and narrow spaces.
